residency_notes: US-only inference offer for Claude Platform on AWS. Anthropic documents that inference_geo=us keeps inference within US data centers on supported 4.6+ models.
prompt_training_notes: Anthropic says customer API data is not used to train its models by default.
user_identifier_notes: Phaseo does not currently send this provider a provider-facing user identifier in the Anthropic chat adapter.
regional_pricing_notes: US-only inference on Claude Platform on AWS is priced at 1.1x the standard rate on Claude Opus 4.6, Claude Sonnet 4.6, and later models.
